about.subtitle: We are Gozoom Technologies
about.title: End-to-End Custom Software Development Company
about.p1: Gozoom Technologies is an offshore software development company with more than 3 years of experience in steering clients through digital transformation. We are a team of innovators and technologists offering futuristic software product development services to enterprises. As one of the leading software development companies, we have a proven track record of success and strive to stay ahead of the curve by constantly innovating and embracing the latest advancements in technology.
about.p2: We are dedicated to helping businesses thrive in today's rapidly evolving markets by empowering them with software development & enterprise technology solutions that deliver measurable results.

stats.years_desc: Extensive experience in delivering IT Solutions & Services.
stats.clients_desc: Clients across the globe testifying our quality & processes.
stats.awards_desc: Industry prestigious awards for excellence and innovation.
stats.experts_desc: Team of qualified, skilled and committed professionals.

workforce.subtitle: Talent & Acquisition
workforce.desc: We help enterprises build and manage high-performing teams globally. From contingent staffing and direct hire to global payroll compliance, our workforce solutions are designed to scale your operations seamlessly.

hero.desc: Delivering Innovation and Excellence beyond Expectation

journey.subtitle: Our Journey
journey.p1_end: , your premier partner for transformative digital solutions. With years of deep industry expertise, we empower organizations to streamline operations, engage customers, and accelerate growth.
journey.p2: We believe in building true partnerships. By deeply understanding your unique challenges, our team crafts bespoke IT strategies—from advanced integrations and retail tech to comprehensive cloud and AI solutions—designed specifically to give you a competitive edge.
journey.p3: We are driven by a singular mission: to deliver excellence and shape the future of technology for our clients globally.

stand_for.subtitle: Values & Vision
stand_for.desc: Our passion lies in developing cutting-edge technology that drives substantial value. We are committed to a collaborative environment that settles for nothing less than excellence.

innovation.title: INNOVATION
items: + To ideate better and innovative strategy
+ To create Now and future proof solutions
+ To adapt to changing trends effortlessly
+ To outplace and outpace your competitors

commitments.title: COMMITMENTS
items: + To ensure all stakeholders are working

excellence.title: EXCELLENCE
items: + To be customer-driven more than ever
+ To take real time and informed decisions

process.subtitle: The Journey
process.title: Our Collaborative Process
process.desc: We don't just build software; we architect solutions. Here's how we move from initial concept to a polished digital product.

step1.title: Share Your Requirement
step1.desc: We listen deeply to your vision, analyzing your business needs from day one to ensure a solid foundation.

step2.title: NDA Protection
step2.desc: Your intellectual property is sacred. We sign strict confidentiality agreements to keep your ideas 100% secure.

step3.title: Expert Consultation
step3.desc: Our senior architects evaluate your needs to recommend the perfect tech stack for scalability and speed.

hero.subtitle: Enterprise Integration
hero.desc: Fueled by extensive knowledge, thorough research, and broad industry experience — connecting your enterprise systems seamlessly.

expertise.subtitle: Our Expertise
expertise.desc1: Our proficiency in integration is evidenced by our experience of over 1800 cross-consulting hours, working with all major integration tools, whether on-premises or in the cloud.
expertise.desc2: We excel in seamlessly integrating all major ERP and business systems, encompassing SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Oracle ERP, SuccessFactors, Workday, Coupa, and Concur.

apart.subtitle: Differentiators
apart.p1: As organizations go through transformational phases, such as expansion through organic growth or mergers and acquisitions, they often require new systems to be added to their IT landscape.
apart.p2: Our commitment lies in aiding organizations in guaranteeing business continuity, harnessing the full potential of data, seamless system integration, and leveraging technology for transformation.

card1.title: Harness your Current IT Landscape
card1.desc: We offer solutions that capitalize on your current IT landscape investments, facilitating transformation to a scalable and agile application landscape.

card2.title: Experience Powerful Integrations
card2.desc: System integration is a comprehensive process — whether it involves a small number of interfaces or a large-scale integration project with extensive connection points.

card3.title: Attain Your Desired Business Results
card3.desc: We go beyond your objectives — examining your existing obstacles, previous attempts, and overarching aspirations to deliver optimal outcomes for your enterprise.

hero.subtitle: Retail Technology
hero.desc: We aim to revolutionize and enhance the retail experience like never before through innovation and transformation.

execution.title: RETAIL EXECUTION
execution.desc: GOZOOM's connected retail solutions empower global companies to enhance retail execution, boost sales, and increase profitability through innovative and industry-leading products and solutions.

security.title: SECURITY
security.desc: GOZOOM offers customized solutions to protect brands comprehensively, safeguard investments and reputation, prevent counterfeits, and increase profits through track and trace capabilities.

experience.title: CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE
experience.desc: At GOZOOM, we prioritize enhancing the customer experience. We offer a range of solutions that cater to different shopping experiences such as pop-up stores, web or app shopping, QR or voice-based commerce.

choose_us.subtitle: Next-Gen Commerce
choose_us.title: Empowering Modern Retailers
choose_us.desc: We help brick-and-mortar stores transition into data-driven digital hubs. Our solutions bridge the gap between physical storefronts and the digital marketplace.

sync.title: Omnichannel Sync
sync.desc: Unified inventory across web, mobile, and store.

loyalty.title: Customer Loyalty
loyalty.desc: Deep analytics on buyer behavior and repeat visits.

profit.title: Real-time Profit
profit.desc: Live reporting on sales and cost margin metrics.

testimonials.subtitle: Client Success
testimonials.empty: Collaborating with global brands to redefine retail excellence.

team.subtitle: Our Team
team.desc1: Have peace of mind knowing we'll deliver outstanding solutions with affordability in mind!
team.desc2: Our team of web development professionals is ready to bring your dream website, online store, or custom web application to life with speed and precision.

t1.name: Aditya Rathor
t1.text: We engaged with Gozoom Web Development for our company's website overhaul, and the results were exceptional. Their team exhibited profound technical expertise, delivering a modern and user-friendly website.

t2.name: Rishabh
t2.text: Working with Gozoom Web Development was a game-changer for our business. Their team of developers demonstrated unparalleled skill and creativity in bringing our vision to life.

t3.name: Himanshu Singh
t3.text: We partnered with Gozoom Web Development to revamp our company's online presence, and the outcome exceeded our expectations. Their technical prowess and innovative approach transformed our website.

t4.name: Ravi Kumar
t4.text: Hiring Gozoom Web Development was one of the best decisions we made for our e-commerce venture. Their expertise in web development and e-commerce solutions helped us create a robust online store.
